payload.answer: I’m not confident enough to store this as a durable memory. Please clarify the Sam note or provide more context.

entity_resolution.reason: Cloud escalation is disabled and the Sam note is ambiguous with low confidence, so no durable entity update should be made without user clarification.

details: Clarification requested due to ambiguity and low confidence.

repair_options: Ask the user to clarify who Sam is and what the note should say.
Provide additional context or the exact wording of the memory to save.
